programme.title: Zombie House Flipping

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping
programme.desc: May the ultimate treasure hunt begin! First up, Keith uncovers clues to a hidden pool; then, a cryptic message in a bottle sends the team on a wild goose chase; what's buried beneath these Zombies could hold the key to secret fortunes.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: Family Business
programme.desc: When Tommy Harr spots a boarded-up hoarder house in Columbus' sought-after Merion Village, even his own family thinks he's gone too far; with an immense amount of personal property, century-old wiring, a barricaded room, and a basement jammed to the rafters with junk, the risk is real. Despite his father's warning, Tommy buys the house; what follows is a massive clean-out, a total layout overhaul,

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: No longer enamored by the concrete jungle, Michael and April have decided to buy a mountain home to reconnect with the outdoors and encourage their kids to unplug from city life; but when the question becomes top-dollar turnkey versus bottom-end blank canvas, it may be back to the drawing board.

programme.title: Million Dollar Mountain Homes
programme.desc: Looking to kick off a new chapter of personal growth and wellness, Veronica has decided to move to the mountains; torn between options offering traditional comfort, modern warmth, or majestic views, she looks to the eagles and her agent to help decide which property to call home.
